entries.title: Course registration closes
entries.summary: Semester V course registration closes at 5:00 PM. Late registration needs advisor approval.

entries.title: Attendance eligibility rule
entries.summary: Students need at least 75 percent attendance in each course to be eligible for end-semester exams.

entries.title: Scholarship renewal forms
entries.summary: Merit scholarship renewal forms must be submitted through the student portal before midnight.

entries.title: Mid-semester exam timetable
entries.summary: The revised mid-semester timetable is available in the academics office and student portal.

entries.title: Library fine and book issue policy
entries.summary: Standard book issue duration is 14 days. Late returns are charged at 5 INR per day per book.

entries.title: Project submission format
entries.summary: Final project submissions must include source code, README, architecture notes, test evidence, and a demo video link.
